name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: The Latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)
**Memo:** Update from the Trail
**From:** Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager

Gov. John Kasich was in New Hampshire this past week talking about his plan to balance the federal budget and send money, power and influence back to the people.

He also called on Congress to override the President's veto of the defense authorization bill. Governor Kasich believes we must increase defense spending and hold the line on non-defense discretionary spending. We need military strength to keep our nation safe while we must balance the budget to grow our economy and not pass our debts on to our children and grandchildren.

The Governor will be headed to Colorado on Tuesday to participate in the CNBC presidential debate Wednesday evening. Here is a short recap of the week:

**Gov. John Kasich Calls on Congress to Override the President's Veto of the 2016 Defense Authorization Act:** ([read more here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232660:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232660:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r)
**
****Featured Op-Eds:

**
• **Union Leader (John Kasich):** Balancing the Budget is a Moral Imperative ([read more](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232661:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

• **Washington Times (Sen. Gordon Humphrey):** Let's Make the U.S. Economy First in the World Again ([read more](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232662:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

**Endorsements & Ballot News:

**
• Kasich For America Pennsylvania Leadership Team Announced ([read more](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232663:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

• South Carolina State Sen. Raymond Cleary & State Rep. Gary Clary Endorse John Kasich ([read more](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232664:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

• Kasich For America Missouri Leadership Team Announced ([read more](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232665:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

• John Kasich First to File on the Alaska GOP Ballot ([read more](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232666:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

**New Hampshire: **

Gov. Kasich participated in a Town Hall with the MSNBC "Morning Joe" crew in Hanover, visited with Dartmouth College Republicans, attended a House Party in Concord and participated in Town Halls with voters in Newport, Manchester & Milford.

• **MSNBC's "Morning Joe" Town Hall - Aired segments:
****
**
• Governor Kasich: Balancing the Budget and Turning Around Our Country ([watch here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232667:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

• Governor Kasich: Obama Didn't Grow this Economy ([watch here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232668:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

• Governor Kasich to Students: You Can Change the World ([watch here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232669:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

• Governor Kasich: Foreign Policy and His Record in Ohio ([watch here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232670:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

• **NBC News:** Kasich Aims to Break 'Anger and Partisanship' in Washington ([read more](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232671:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

• **Washington Examiner:** Kasich Agrees with Biden on Hillary's 'Enemies': ([Read more](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232672:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

• **View Pictures from the New Hampshire Events** ([here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232673:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

**The Upcoming GOP Debate - Wednesday, Oct. 28:
**

The Governor will be headed to the University of Colorado Boulder on Tuesday to participate in the CNBC "Your Money, Your Vote: The Presidential Debate on the Economy" Wednesday evening. Be sure to tune into CNBC at 8:00PM EDT to watch.

Also be on the lookout for emails from our team this week to provide you with some information on ways that you can help get Gov. Kasich's message out and provide ways for more people to get involved with the campaign.
**
**

**Other News Coverage:

**
• **Fox News - On the Record with Greta Van Susteren 10/23/15** ([watch here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232674:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r))

• **Note:** Be sure to pick up a copy of this week's Newsmax print edition!

**
**
[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31232675:s2XNCOmNU:m:1:958431888:FAFE817C9359FAD5DE23AE95F9F7B22F:r)

name: Chelsea Clinton
subject: Will you sign my mom’s birthday card?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Will you sign her card? | Friend --

When I was younger, my mom always made my birthdays special (and lots of fun). This year I want to help do something extra special for her.

I know that she cares a lot about you, about every American, about making this country better, and about providing all families with more opportunities. She works so hard for all of us -- it would mean a lot to give a little back to her on her special day.

**Will you help me by signing the card for my mom's birthday?**

| [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM4MzE0NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTYyODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM4MzE0NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTYyODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you!

Chelsea

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM4MzE0NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTYyODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM4MzE0NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTYyODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM4MzE0NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTYyODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM4MzE0NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTYyODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM4MzE0NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTYyODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM4MzE0NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTYyODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM4MzE0NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTYyODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Murphy
subject: How are you spending YOUR Halloween?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Team Murphy has a plan for Halloween week -- and it doesn't involve candy and pumpkins.

**We 're going to be at the Florida State Democratic Convention in Orlando.** It'll be a collection of Patrick and other dedicated Democrats that would scare the socks off of any Republican candidate.

Patrick will be talking to supporters and getting everyone excited (just in case they're not excited enough already) about the Senate race.

Patrick will be taking the stage on Oct 31st to rally the troops. **When he hits that stage, we want him to know we 're with him.**

[**Help us raise $35,000 before Patrick gives his speech at the Convention. Give $5, or whatever you can, right now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2169/738133e4/3a7d3830/7f832693/2395692757/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151026?refcode=pme151026_a&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Everyone at the convention will be committed to turning Florida blue in 2016. They'll work their fingers to the bone knocking on doors, making phone calls, handing out fliers, and volunteering at events.

Their work on the ground will be a critical part of our success. **And so will the work we do online right now, friend.**

This race is hugely competitive. Patrick has Republicans and dark money groups to contend with. Every time you sign a petition, give a dollar, or fill out a survey -- you help build a foundation that even the Kochs and Karl Rove can't defeat.

[**So when Patrick takes that stage on Saturday, let 's make sure he has the support he needs. Send in your $5 or $10 contribution to help us reach $35,000 by then.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2169/738133e4/3a7d3830/7f832693/2395692757/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151026?refcode=pme151026_a&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Maybe there will be pumpkins at the Convention -- you never know. But there will _definitely_ be some fantastic Democrats.

And hopefully by then, we'll be able to tell Patrick we've crushed yet another goal.

Thanks for all of your help.

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2169/738133e4/3a7d3830/7f83268c/2395692757/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2169/738133e4/3a7d3830/7f83268d/2395692757/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2169/738133e4/3a7d3830/7f83268e/2395692757/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

name: Barbara Mikulski
subject: Wish Hillary a happy birthday!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Add your name to Hillary's card! | Friend --

I like to think my friends and I made up one of the original "girl squads" that everyone talks about now. (Although, back in the day they definitely weren't as popular -- there were barely enough of us in the Senate to make up a basketball team!)

There's never been anything quite like the bonds we made. Those women became some of my closest allies, and I'm so proud to include Hillary on my list of friends that I respect and admire so much. It also means that I make sure to send her my best wishes whenever I can.

Hillary's birthday is tomorrow, and I want her to know how much we all appreciate her.

**Will you join me in wishing her just the happiest birthday?**

| [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM4MzE2OTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTgwMDIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM4MzE2OTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTgwMDIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks for joining in on the festivities!

Barbara Mikulski

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM4MzE2OTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTgwMDIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM4MzE2OTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTgwMDIyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM4MzE2OTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTgwMDIyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM4MzE2OTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTgwMDIyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM4MzE2OTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTgwMDIyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM4MzE2OTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTgwMDIyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM4MzE2OTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNTgwMDIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
